What we do
Locksmith services
From emergency lockouts to high-security upgrades — honest work, fair prices, every time.

Residential lockouts

Locked out of your home? Fast, damage-free entry day or night.

Commercial security

Master key systems, access control, and lock upgrades for businesses.

Vehicle lockouts

Keys locked in the car? Emergency entry and remote programming.

Lock replacement

Deadbolts, mortice locks, security gates — supply and installation.

Key cutting

Duplicate keys for home, office, and vehicle — while you wait.

Security upgrades

Expert advice and fitting of high-security locks to protect what matters.

About Pete
Dedication in every job
Every lock is a puzzle. Every customer deserves it solved quickly, cleanly, and with a smile.— Peter Smit

Pete Smit has been serving Cape Town with sharp locksmith skills for years. As a right-leg amputee, Pete knows what it means to face a challenge head-on — and he brings that same grit and determination to every single callout.

Whether it is a household lockout at midnight or a full commercial re-key, Pete shows up, gets down on one knee (literally), and gets the job done. No fuss, no shortcuts.
